description: Dell iDRAC / HP iLO hardware health — powered by mrlhansen/idrac_exporter

targets.expr: last_over_time(idrac_storage_drive_health{instance=~"$instance"}[30d]) * on (instance, id, storage_id) group_left(name, model, mediatype) last_over_time(idrac_storage_drive_info{instance=~"$instance"}[30d])

title: iDRAC
